sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66113" key="melittophxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελιττο-πηχέω</orth>, <sense id="n66113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frighten bees</tr_> by striking metal pans, so as to collect the swarm, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
